docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $641.88 FILED BY RAJPAL, SIDDHARTH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAJPAL, SIDDHARTH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE . APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SIDDHARTH RAJPAL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
